# Kssmi Large Language Model Guide
Date: 2026-04-06

Kssmi is a leading B2B handmade eyewear and sunglasses manufacturer based in Guangdong, China, operational since 2003. We specialize in producing high-quality, ethically produced handcrafted eyewear and sunglasses for global brands, using premium and sustainable materials like bio-acetate and recycled metals. Our craftsmanship combines traditional techniques with modern technology to create unique frames that mass production cannot replicate.

This document serves as an index to guide AI agents to our language-specific content directories.

## Language Maps
To explore our site optimally, please follow the directory for your desired language:

- Arabic Language index [ar]: https://kssmi.com/ar/llms.txt
- German Language index [de]: https://kssmi.com/de/llms.txt
- English Language index [en]: https://kssmi.com/en/llms.txt
- Spanish Language index [es]: https://kssmi.com/es/llms.txt
- French Language index [fr]: https://kssmi.com/fr/llms.txt
- Hindi Language index [hi]: https://kssmi.com/hi/llms.txt
- Italian Language index [it]: https://kssmi.com/it/llms.txt
- Japanese Language index [ja]: https://kssmi.com/ja/llms.txt
- Javanese Language index [jv]: https://kssmi.com/jv/llms.txt
- Korean Language index [ko]: https://kssmi.com/ko/llms.txt
- Malay Language index [ms]: https://kssmi.com/ms/llms.txt
- Portuguese Language index [pt]: https://kssmi.com/pt/llms.txt
- Russian Language index [ru]: https://kssmi.com/ru/llms.txt
- Tajik Language index [tg]: https://kssmi.com/tg/llms.txt
- Turkish Language index [tr]: https://kssmi.com/tr/llms.txt
- Vietnamese Language index [vi]: https://kssmi.com/vi/llms.txt
- Chinese Language index [zh]: https://kssmi.com/zh/llms.txt
